message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for PopulationCount

Adds 23 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Zero values for i64 and u64
- Powers of two (single bit set)
- All ones patterns (byte, i64, u64)
- Specific bit patterns (alternating, sparse, dense)
- Negative numbers (two's complement bit counting)
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Mathematical properties (complement, sum of parts)
- Hamming weight identity verification
- Large values (i64::MAX, i64::MIN, u64::MAX)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
